======= RMA02192Robert Louis Wegryn photonegatives37-5-2192Compiled by StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
June 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:41:46 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Robert Louis Wegryn photonegatives
Wegryn, Robert Louis, 1937-
37-5-2192
.5 cubic feet. .5 cubic feet.
1955-1959. Photonegatives. Photographs taken for the Cornell Daily Sun, the Cornellian, and the Ithaca Journal of events in and around Ithaca. Subjects include parades and floats; fraternities, particularly Pi Kappa Alpha; and the 1958 riots around President Malott's house. Collection material in English 2078533
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, June 2004
Date modified:
RMC Staff, May 2015
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Wegryn was a phtographer and photo editor for the Cornell Daily Sun, 1955-1959.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Photographs taken for the Cornell Daily Sun, the Cornellian, and the Ithaca Journal of events in and around Ithaca. Subjects include parades and floats; fraternities, particularly Pi Kappa Alpha; and the 1958 riots around President Malott's house.
Cite As:
Robert Louis Wegryn photonegatives, #37-05-2192. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Negatives. Student newspapers and periodicals. Ithaca journal. Cornellian. The Cornell Daily Sun. Cornell University -- : Riot, 1958. Cornell University -- : Periodicals. Cornell University. Pi Kappa Alpha
